case_title: RYAN CRONIN VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER WAIVING THE REQUIREMENTS OF GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4 IS DENIED. THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT FROM JUL-18-2011 AT 6:30 PM TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JUL-18-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
